title: Marcel Bich — The man who made the ballpoint pen affordable
content_html:
Marcel Bich — The man who made the ballpoint pen affordable

Marcel Bich, a French manufacturer of traditional ink pens, was the man who turned the ballpoint pen into an item that today almost anyone can afford. Bich was appalled at the poor quality of the ballpoint pens that were available, and was also shocked at their high cost. However, he recognised that the ballpoint was a firmly established invention, and he decided to design a cheap pen that worked well and would be commercially successful.

Bich went to the Biro brothers and asked them if he could use the design of their original invention in one of his own pens. In return, he offered to pay them every time he sold a pen. Then, for two years, Bich studied the detailed construction of every ballpoint pen that was being sold, often working with a microscope. By 1950, he was ready to introduce his new wonder: a plastic pen with a clear barrel that wrote smoothly, did not leak and only cost a few cents. He called it the 'Bic Cristal'.

Bich became extremely wealthy thanks to his invention, which had worldwide appeal. Over the next 60 years, his company, Societe Bic, opened factories all over the world and expanded its range of inexpensive products. Today, Bic is as famous for its lighters and razors as it is for its pens, and you can even buy a Bic mobile phone.

questions.question: It is thanks to Marcel Bich that most people today are able to 1 ________ a ballpoint pen.
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–7

Complete the summary below.

Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

most people today

able to

ballpoint pen

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Marcel Bich ... turned the ballpoint pen into an item that today almost anyone can afford.

Bước 3: Phân tích

EN:
The summary says "most people today are able to..."
The passage says "almost anyone can afford".

VI:
Bài tóm tắt diễn đạt lại:

almost anyone = most people today
can afford = có khả năng mua được

=> afford

_blockConfig.noteContent: It is thanks to Marcel Bich that most people today are able to [1] a ballpoint pen. It was the bad quality and [2] of the pens which were available at the time that inspired him to design a [3] ballpoint pen that would be both inexpensive and reliable. After getting permission from the Biro brothers to base his pen on their [4], he carefully [5] other ballpoints that were sold in the shops, and in 1950 introduced his own version, the ‘Bic Cristal’. It was popular with the [6], and Bich became very rich. His company, Bic, now makes a variety of cheap [7], such as lighters and razors.

questions.questionHtml: It is thanks to Marcel Bich that most people today are able to 1_______ a ballpoint pen. It was the bad quality and 2_______ of the pens which were available at the time that inspired him to design a 3_______ ballpoint pen that would be both inexpensive and reliable. After getting permission from the Biro brothers to base his pen on their 4_______, he carefully 5_______ other ballpoints that were sold in the shops, and in 1950 introduced his own version, the ‘Bic Cristal’. It was popular with the 6_______, and Bich became very rich. His company, Bic, now makes a variety of cheap 7_______, such as lighters and razors.

questions.question: It was the bad quality and 2 ________ of available pens...
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

bad quality

available at the time

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Bich was appalled at the poor quality of the ballpoint pens that were available, and was also shocked at their high cost.

Bước 3: Phân tích

EN:
The passage gives two problems:

poor quality
high cost

The summary already mentions bad quality, so we need the second problem.

VI:
Hai vấn đề của bút bi thời đó:

chất lượng kém
giá cao

=> high cost

questions.question: that inspired him to design a 3 ________ ballpoint pen...
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

design

ballpoint pen

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

he decided to design a cheap pen that worked well

Bước 3: Phân tích

EN:
cheap = inexpensive

VI:
Ông muốn thiết kế một cây bút rẻ tiền nhưng hoạt động tốt.

=> cheap

questions.question: After getting permission from the Biro brothers to base his pen on their 4 ________,
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

permission

Biro brothers

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

use the design of their original invention

Bước 3: Phân tích
EN:
The summary rewrites:
use the design of their original invention

base his pen on their original invention

VI:
Ông xin phép dùng thiết kế phát minh gốc của anh em nhà Biro.

=> original invention

questions.question: he carefully 5 ________ other ballpoints sold in the shops,
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

carefully

other ballpoints

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

for two years, Bich studied the detailed construction of every ballpoint pen

Bước 3: Phân tích

EN:
The summary changes:
studied the detailed construction
→ carefully studied

VI:
Ông nghiên cứu rất kỹ cấu tạo của các loại bút bi khác.

=> studied

questions.question: It was popular with the 6 ________, and Bich became very rich.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

popular

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

The public liked it immediately

Bước 3: Phân tích
EN:
liked immediately

popular with

VI:
Người dân thích nó ngay lập tức.

=> public

questions.question: His company, Bic, now makes a variety of cheap 7 ________, such as lighters and razors.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

lighters

razors

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

expanded its range of inexpensive products

Bước 3: Phân tích

EN:
lighters and razors are examples of products.

VI:
Bật lửa và dao cạo là các sản phẩm giá rẻ của Bic.

=> inexpensive products
